send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately if cx did not receive their order
Send to CS immediately for post purchase inquiries about the status of the mold, or issues with the molds
Send to CS for pricing inquiries
Send to CS if cx is looking for a more specific piece not available on the website
Send to CS if cx is asking for a code and we don't have one
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Use Teeth instead of Pieces (e.g 8 teeth at the top)
templates: If the image is not coming through a second time, send Broken Image temp
For CUSTOM GRILLZ & ACCESSORIES INQUIRIES for models not available on the website use PS shortcut
For urgent concerns/delayed escalation response use PS shortcut
For delayed orders and the customer is frustrated use PS shortcut
For customer service use shortcut CS which has both the direct email/number
dos_and_donts: Do not use the order history as a reference to order status
If customers want to cancel their order always ask for the reason for cancellation
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend pre-made grillz! Upsell to fitted and custom grillz
When recommending an item, let the cx know they can customize their order on the product page
When recommending an item, ask the cx if they are working with a budget
Use LFG shortcut to gather information and provide recommendations when cx ask about:

U owe
Me 6 tops
With diamonds we reshipped it for the diamonds being loose when we unwrap the girllmamdu
Son good nothing in return not even the the firt grill it was great I wants tomfixnotmmyself

Hey a promo have me save even more

Custom Gold Grillz: I'm sorry for any inconvenience this has caused. The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@customgoldgrillz.com or give us a call at (415) 413-4915, Monday - Friday 9 am - 5 pm PST. Our team is happy to help!
I have tried to call that number multiple times. I have left literally 30 voicemails and I never got a call back. I'm getting treated like my money is nothing.

Like I said, I'm working with the Better Business Bureau now and USPS to try to shut down on all all online activity through social media paid for advertising because this is BS over six teeth. That's my son's graduation present. I'm pissed. We have already received the teeth took a small picture of them. It is a little blurry. He wanted to send them back because a few diamonds was loose on their way of falling out and I wanted to get it done local but he figured he would get a discount on his next purchase last year I spent about $7600 at tracks MYC on small little jewel for him. This is ridiculous. This is what my son should have. This is what he did have.

This is what My Son got in the mail. This is what I sent you pictures of on the website. This is what I sent pictures of to the Better Business Bureau and I took up to USPS. I did not want to ship this back, but there was only about three or four small diamonds and I wanted to fix them but My Son convinced me to ship them back. We did not get anything in return you keep asking us for a damn order number, and I have told you that My Son deleted his spam folder and the order number must have been in the spam folder because it is not in the regular folder the only thing we've had was a shipping order number. It was literally the cheapest pair that he could get for six teeth. I'm not understanding why they're such a problem.
Wrong email

I am starting to feel like because I am in law enforcement because I am a homicide detective and my brother is mayor Michael Bell that you probably did a little research and want to treat my son bad thinking that he is a silver spoon child will actually let's opposite. We come from the poorest side of Toledo, Ohio. I coach basketball for the Cherry Woods pretty much La Grange elementary a very, very poor side of the city that I grew up on that I was lucky enough to get a job and move away, my son Also himself has stayed out of the streets playing basketball ranked number 40 in the United States for kids under 18 and I am very happy for him. I promise to this girl and he got it but ever since we shipped it he has had nothing and this is complete BS 419-807-2782 is my Number. My email is. jrjr102310@gmail.com
jrjrsjb3@gmail.com

Custom Gold Grillz: I'm truly sorry you're going through all of this. I can only imagine how upsetting it must be, especially with this being such a meaningful gift for your son's graduation. You've done everything right, taking the time to follow up, send photos, and explain the situation, and I really appreciate you sharing all of that with us.

I also want to sincerely apologize for the lack of response you've received over the phone. I understand how incredibly frustrating it is to feel ignored after spending your hard-earned money and putting trust in a company. You're absolutely right to expect better.

Unfortunately, my system is limited and I'm unable to resolve order-specific issues directly. However, I want to make sure this is properly documented and handled. The best next step is to send us an email at support@customgoldgrillz.com with all the details, including any photos you've taken and the shipping confirmation number you have on hand. That way, our customer support team, who are much more equipped to assist with returns, repairs, or replacements-can step in and take action.

Please know your concern is incredibly important. Thank you so much again for your extended patience and for giving us the opportunity to make things right.

Sir, I've already been through these steps. This is just a revolving door. Oh my God can you please just send my son another mold so we can get another grilled started this is ridiculous man. This is getting me so fired up that I am ready to just work with the Better Business Bureau I'm trying to shut down all five major media outlets that are social. All I want is my son to have is grill, sir. I paid a lot of damn money for that. I am a homicide detective by. I'm not a judge or a rap star or a super high paid legal attorney I don't make no more than $50,000 a year if I'm lucky.

These were My Son's teeth. There was diamonds missing so we sent it back. We never got nothing in return and I even had the lady at the post office copy over all the information she even helped save me a couple dollars. It's been so long now she just helped me get my insurance moneyback, but it was only $200. This is ridiculous Sir I have watched my son cry numerous times over this can you please just make it right sir ma'am whoever this may be.

Custom Gold Grillz: I totally understand the frustration with this! As advised, I have limited access on my end. The best way to handle this is really to email us or call us via the email and number I gave you. I'm really sorry for the inconvenience.
I mean with all due respect that's the picture right there

He took a picture when he first got them we sent it in. There was diamonds missing on the front tooth his front right there was also just a few damage messing on the very right tooth not enough for me to want to send it back, but he is very obnoxious
I just wanted it taken care of please. I tried to email that and it's just giving me a runaround.
I need to speak to somebody personally
And as far as the number, I have called that damn number possibly 100 times my son's
Graduation present is very important to me. Plus he is very insecure about his front teeth because they were cracked in a basketball tournament.

Custom Gold Grillz: I understand, however, I only have access to assist with pre-purchase concerns. As much as I would like to help you, I'm afraid I really don't have access to it. Also, please make sure to call us during our business hours: Monday - Friday 9 am - 5 pm PST. I totally understand how important it is as a graduation gift, however, I really don't have access to assist you with this concern.

And like I said, My Son has purchased grillz.from multiple different companies. I sent you a picture of a gold pair that he got within the amount of waiting on yours to be returned. It's just absolutely ridiculous. There's no reason why you should not fix this problem, especially when we wanted to spend money with you down the road because you were charmed and watches are at a good price and I would like to get him a couple pair. Also, you offer something that I have been looking for.

Custom Gold Grillz: I truly hear your frustration, and I'm really sorry this experience has been so disappointing, especially with it being a meaningful gift for your son. I completely understand wanting to support a brand you believe in, and it's frustrating when things don't go as expected. I wish I had the tools to resolve this directly for you, but my access is limited to pre-purchase support. We are dealing with an influx of support messages but this does not make your concern any less important, the team is working as hard as possible to address each issue. I know my apologies won't help in this situation but rest assured, I totally understand how frustrating this can be and I'm very sorry I can't provide you with an immediate solution. I appreciate your patience as we work to resolve this.
I understand that if it has only been a week or two, but it has been a couple months. This is ridiculous.

Template used: "Pre-order shipping delays"; last updated: 2025-05-07 18:47:04.946

Comfrt: Thanks for reaching out! Sorry to hear you still haven't gotten your order yet. Comfrt will make every effort to ship your available pre-order inventory as close to the estimated shipment date as possible. This may result in multiple shipments. 

Should an item or items not be shipped within 14 days after the original estimated shipment date, you may request a cancellation of the affected item(s) for a refund to your original method of payment by emailing our customer support team at info@comfrt.com.

Comfrt will provide updates via email as soon as possible regarding your pre-order status. If we are ultimately unable to fulfill your order, a full refund will be automatically processed.
